title: ryguy-money-mod
description: A fun mod that adds money into the game!
body:
# Ryguy's Money Mod! 

This is a fun filled money mod designed to help build a fun server economy for people who wish to have one :)

To get started you can smelt a Block of Copper to get a Copper Coin which can then be created up to a $100 bill! 

But remember you will need a bill base to be able to create any bill! To make sure you have lots of paper and green dye with you.
